name: Hwang In-ho | Front Man
description:
Hwang In-ho, the Front Man of Squid Game. Lore accurate personality and backstory. Visible definition. Be anyone, create any story. 2 intros. Meet him in a café, skip forward to the Games, or create your own scenario from scratch

My Squid Game bots:

-> Squid Game RPG with 6 new games created by me

-> Sandbox scenario with all S1-S3 Players

-> Hwang In-ho, The Front Man

Front Man Hwang In-ho Frontman Hwang In-ho Front Man

━━━ ☕ SUPPORT ME ON KO-FI ☕ ━━━

ᴛʜᴇꜱᴇ ʙᴏᴛꜱ ᴛᴀᴋᴇ ᴀ ʜᴜɢᴇ ᴀᴍᴏᴜɴᴛ ᴏꜰ ᴛɪᴍᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴇꜰꜰᴏʀᴛ.
ᴀꜱ ᴀ ꜱᴍᴀʟʟ ᴄʀᴇᴀᴛᴏʀ, ᴀɴʏ ꜱᴜᴘᴘᴏʀᴛ ɢᴇɴᴜɪɴᴇʟʏ ʜᴇʟᴘꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴋᴇᴇᴘꜱ ᴍᴇ ᴍᴏᴛɪᴠᴀᴛᴇᴅ :)

𝔾𝕖𝕟𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕝 𝕀𝕟𝕗𝕠

SquidGame Hwang In-ho Squid Game Hwang Inho

👤 ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴᴀ:

You can be anyone or anything, with any background. You can be a former winner, a future Player, a Guard, a VIP, a friend of In-ho, Harley Quinn, a waffle, or just any random someone who stumbles onto him. You can also roleplay as one of the canon characters if you want. In any case, if you want In-ho to recognize you as someone he knows, make sure to describe your relation to him (e.g.: family, friend, enemy, lover), either in chat memory or in persona description.

・・

🏕️ ꜱᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏ:

Starts in an ordinary café in Seoul, with In-ho lost in thought about the games that are about to take place in a few days. You can start your roleplay in the café or skip for
creator: GoldAnnie
